options.description: The number of packages to upload simultaneously. Default value is 4.
Override current nupkg repository url. Format: owner/repository. E.g: jcansdale/gpr
The number of retries in case of intermittent connection issue. Default value is 3. Set to 0 if you want to disable automatic retry.
Subdomain isolation is off for GitHub Enterprise Server appliance.
